allow: Bash(node -e " const asar = require\('asar'\); const list = asar.listPackage\('release/win-unpacked/resources/app.asar'\); const relevant = list.filter\(f => f.match\(/preload|index\\.\(html|css|js\)/\)\); console.log\(relevant.join\('\\n'\)\); ")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name',''\)\); print\('version:', d.get\('version',''\)\); print\('\\ndeps:'\); [print\(' ', k,':', v\) for k,v in d.get\('dependencies',{}\).items\(\)]; print\('\\ndevDeps:'\); [print\(' ', k,':', v\) for k,v in d.get\('devDependencies',{}\).items\(\)]")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const main = fs.readFileSync\('main.js','utf8'\); console.log\('filesDir:', main.includes\('filesDir'\)\); console.log\('select-and-copy-file:', main.includes\('select-and-copy-file'\)\); console.log\('open-file:', main.includes\(\\"'open-file'\\"\)\); console.log\('delete-file:', main.includes\(\\"'delete-file'\\"\)\); const preload = fs.readFileSync\('preload.js','utf8'\); console.log\('preload selectAndCopyFile:', preload.includes\('selectAndCopyFile'\)\);")
